resources.string: Are you sure you want to remove the selected chapters from the database? Downloaded files will not be affected.
Are you sure you want to remove all chapters from the selected entries? Downloaded files will not be affected.
Advanced settings are only available in WebView rendering mode.
No CSS or JS Snippets are available in this mode
Only translate if language differs from target
No translation engine configured. Please configure one in Settings > Translation.
Add translated title to alternative titles
Configure translation engine and API keys in Settings → Translation
Add delays between downloads to avoid rate limiting
Maximum random delay added to base delay (ms)
Minimum random delay added to base delay (ms)
Add delays during library updates for novels
Add 3-8 minute delays every 5 novels during library updates
Delay between checking novels during updates (ms)
Add delays during mass import operations
\n⚠ Low delay values may cause sources to rate-limit or block your IP. A minimum of 3 seconds is recommended.
Delay between novels for the same extension
Number of different extensions updating simultaneously (not within same extension)
Apply delays between novels from the same source only
Delay between imports from the same source (different sources run concurrently)
Number of different sources importing simultaneously (throttle between same source is in delay setting)
Automatically resume paused download queue when new chapters are added
0 = store (no compression, fastest), 1-9 = deflate (smaller files, slower)
Embed images from chapter HTML as base64 for offline viewing
Images larger than this will be compressed (0 = no limit)
Quality for compressed images (higher = larger file)
Tap an element to select it
Enter a name for your custom source:
No specific patterns available for this step and framework.
Note: Downloaded chapters will be included. Chapters not yet downloaded will be fetched from the source.
Combine all files into one novel
Automatically add imported EPUBs to this category
This novel will be under "Local novels" after import in Browse.
Only chapters with translations will be included.
Two EPUB files will be created — one original, one translated.
Only downloaded chapters will be included.
Downloaded chapters will be used. Undownloaded chapters will be fetched from source.
Translated chapters will be used when available.
No rules added. Rules apply to chapter content before rendering.
Hide manga library tab, manga browse tabs, and manga settings.
Configure translation engines in Settings → Novel → Translation
Download chapter content if not already available
Maximum time to wait for translation response (seconds)
Show warning when translating more than this many chapters
Don\'t show warning for large batch translations
For pre-built novel source themes (Madara, LightNovelWP, etc.), install extensions from a repository instead.
Enable for sites protected by Cloudflare
Enable if chapters are listed newest first
Enable if the site uses POST requests for search
Enable for novel/text sources, disable for manga/manhwa/webtoon sources
Create a custom source that delegates to an installed extension with a different name/URL
Select an installed novel extension to base your custom source on. You can override the name and base URL.
No novel extensions installed. Install extensions from the Extensions tab first.
Use browser DevTools to find CSS selectors
Navigate to the trending/popular novels section
Find the section showing popular or trending novels on the homepage
Select: 1) Cover IMAGE, 2) TITLE text, 3) Novel URL link
These elements will be used to display novels in popular/latest/search lists
Select 3 novel items: Click on TITLE element of each novel
Click on the title text of 3 different trending novels.
Navigate to the new/latest novels section
Find the section showing recently updated novels
Select 3 novel items: Select the TITLE element for each
Click on the title text of 3 different latest novels
Skip or search for \'a\' (single letter) to identify search URL pattern
Search for a single letter like \'a\' or \'the\'. Look at the URL to find how the search term is passed (e.g., ?s=, ?q=, /search/)
Identify where the search keyword appears in the URL
Look for your search term in the URL. Common patterns: ?s=keyword, ?q=keyword, /search/keyword
Navigate to page 2 to identify pagination pattern
Click on page 2 link. Look for page number in URL (e.g., /page/2, ?page=2, ?p=2)
Click on a novel to open its details page
Navigate to any novel\'s main page
Select: 1) Title, 2) Description/Summary, 3) Cover image, 4) Tags/Genres (optional)
Select each element that shows novel information on the details page
Select chapter items: Click on the TITLE/LINK of chapters
Select at least one chapter item (more improves accuracy)
Open a chapter to identify the content element
Click on any chapter to open its reading page
Select the main text container element
Click on the element containing the actual chapter text/content
Review and save your custom source configuration
Build your own novel source by selecting elements from a website
Navigate to a novel website and select elements step-by-step
Pick an installed KT/JS source, then override URL and name before launching the selector
Open Kotlin/JS repo management before building a source
The guided selector will walk you through:
Enter the URL of the novel website you want to create a source for:
Select a template source, then optionally override name and URL.
No installed KT/JS catalogue sources with HTTP base URLs were found.
Are you sure you want to delete this custom source?
Create a custom source to scrape novels from any website
Guided wizard to select elements visually
Only translate if language differs from target
No translation engine configured. Please configure one in Settings > Translation.
Add translated title to alternative titles
Only chapters with translations will be included.
Two EPUB files will be created — one original, one translated.
Ignore \'Skip recently updated\' and force update
Skip entries that were recently updated during bulk updates
Skip if updated in last %d day(s)
Running VACUUM (this may take a while)…
Database maintenance started — check notifications for progress
Show source name in manga details
Display source name under status on manga details screen
Do you want to save your edits to this chapter?
No quotes saved for this novel
